mapper.sql:
sid, log_date AS logDate, campaign_id AS campaignId, campaign_name AS campaignName, adgroup_id AS adgroupId, adgroup_name AS adgroupName, bidword_id AS bidwordId, original_word AS bidwordText,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN roi END) AS roi1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN cvr END) AS cvr1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN new_alipay_inshop_uv_rate END) AS dealNewCustomerRatio1d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 1 AND alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_uv != 0 AND new_alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(new_alipay_inshop_uv AS DECIMAL(20,8)) / alipay_inshop_uv ELSE NULL END ) AS newCustomerRatio1d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 1 AND alipay_inshop_amt IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_amt != 0 AND alipay_dir_amt IS NOT NULL THEN alipay_dir_amt / alipay_inshop_amt ELSE NULL END ) AS directDealRatio1d,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN roi END) AS roi3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN cvr END) AS cvr3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN new_alipay_inshop_uv_rate END) AS dealNewCustomerRatio3d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 3 AND alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_uv != 0 AND new_alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(new_alipay_inshop_uv AS DECIMAL(20,8)) / alipay_inshop_uv ELSE NULL END ) AS newCustomerRatio3d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 3 AND alipay_inshop_amt IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_amt != 0 AND alipay_dir_amt IS NOT NULL THEN alipay_dir_amt / alipay_inshop_amt ELSE NULL END ) AS directDealRatio3d,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN roi END) AS roi7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN cvr END) AS cvr7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN new_alipay_inshop_uv_rate END) AS dealNewCustomerRatio7d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 7 AND alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_uv != 0 AND new_alipay_inshop_uv IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(new_alipay_inshop_uv AS DECIMAL(20,8)) / alipay_inshop_uv ELSE NULL END ) AS newCustomerRatio7d, MAX( CASE WHEN effect = 7 AND alipay_inshop_amt IS NOT NULL AND alipay_inshop_amt != 0 AND alipay_dir_amt IS NOT NULL THEN alipay_dir_amt / alipay_inshop_amt ELSE NULL END ) AS directDealRatio7d
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM onebp_report_day_bidword WHERE sid = #{sid} AND log_date = #{logDate} AND effect IN (1, 3, 7) GROUP BY sid, log_date, campaign_id, campaign_name, adgroup_id, adgroup_name, bidword_id, original_word ORDER BY campaign_id ASC, adgroup_id ASC, bidword_id ASC
